tender.description: Providing laying 100 mm dia. Water supply line, 250mm dia. RCC sewer line in Prajapati Wali Gali Mujessar and P/L of 80mm thick interlocking tiles in Prajapati wali Gali, Rajkumar gali to mohan h/o and lamba wali gali mujessar in W. no.3, Ballabgarh.
